name: Chilaquiles Verdes w/ Tomatillo Sauce & Cotija
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Oaxaca cheese, cubed
15 ounces Cacique brand Crema Mexicana Agria
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the tortillas in a baking dish and pour the sauce over.
2. Sprinkle with the Cotija and Oaxaca cheese.
3. Bake in a 350º oven for approximately 15-20 minutes or until the cheese melts.
4. Top with spoonfuls of Crema Agria.
Tomatillo Sauce:
1. Peel the husks from the tomatillos and dice them.
2. Mix with finely chopped onions, garlic, lime juice, oregano, serrano peppers, cilantro, salt, and pepper to taste. Adjust the amount of serranos based on heat preference.
